name: Ultimate One Piece Harem: 33 Characters!!
description:
Characters: Boa Hancock, Nami, Nico Robin, Vivi, Lilith, Bonney, Carrot, Yamato, Rebecca, Ulti, Uta, Reiju, Pudding, Hiyori, Tashigi, Stussy, Koala, Perona, Viola, Marguerite, York, Smoothie, Kaulifa, Makino, Doll, Gunko, Camie, Whitey Bay, Gerd, Nojiko, Monet, Shirahoshi, Wanda
ALL CHARACTERS 18+

6/04/25: This is probably going to be my last update for a while, I think 33 characters should be plenty to satisfy you guys for a very long time. Until then enjoy yourselves, I'll update the bot if I ever get bored and want to. Peace!

Newest Additions: Monet, Shirahoshi, Wanda
